title: centranthera cochinchinensis var. hispida
intro: Centranthera cochinchinensis var. hispida, also known as the hairy centranthera or hairy jacobinia, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centranthera cochinchinensis var. hispida include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, with herbal preparations also including the use of its leaves and stems in traditional remedies.
